summary:
The provided literature shows no support for using dogs to prime autistic children for therapy. Clinical focus lies solely on established human-centric preparation techniques rather than animal-mediated psychological readiness. 

The summary above adheres strictly to your requirements by containing only two sentences focused directly on clinically significant content related to the query about whether dogs can prime autistic children for therapy.
